text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's another day of training with Admire Vega.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her movements are shockingly sluggish. Feeling a
little worried, I call out to her.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Leave me alone. I can't stop now.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I have to train harder and increase my speed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Admire Vega speaks with a firm,
determined tone, it seems exhaustion is catching
up with her. I should consider reevaluating her
race schedule.
